sourceRef: tip:Onboarding a new student veteran in under an hour

slides.eyebrow: Onboarding a New Student Veteran in Under an Hour
slides.headline: Streamline Intake with Our Proven Method
slides.body: Follow this step-by-step process to ensure your student veterans are ready to enroll in just 60 minutes.

slides.headline: Verify Eligibility
slides.body: Start by confirming the student's eligibility. Use VA Form 22-1999 to collect necessary information.

slides.headline: Gather Required Documentation
slides.body: Collect all necessary documents to ensure a smooth onboarding process. Common items include ID and enrollment forms.

slides.headline: Complete Financial Aid
slides.body: Ensure the student is set up for financial aid. Check for any outstanding loans or grants.

slides.headline: Register for Classes
slides.body: Guide the student through the class registration process. Confirm all courses are approved.

slides.headline: Follow Up
slides.body: Ensure the student is aware of all upcoming deadlines and resources. Schedule a follow-up meeting.
Learn more about the VASCO Assistant Pro at aimilitaryservices.com/waitlist.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Onboarding a new student veteran in under an hour with a repeatable intake path. Cover eligibility with VA Form 22-1999, gather required documentation, complete financial aid, register for classes, and follow up. Learn more at aimilitaryservices.com/waitlist.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, 'Register for Classes,' as it could benefit from a more specific call to action or a clearer visual representation of the process.
